--- alter_table_alter_column_set_on_update.sql
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar SET ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())

--- AST
&ast.AlterTable{
  Name: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  TableAlteration: &ast.AlterColumn{
    Alter: 16,
    Name:  &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 29,
      NameEnd: 32,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
    Alteration: &ast.AlterColumnSetOnUpdate{
      Set:      33,
      OnUpdate: &ast.OnUpdate{
        On:     37,
        Rparen: 74,
        Expr:   &ast.CallExpr{
          Rparen: 73,
          Func:   &ast.Path{
            Idents: []*ast.Ident{
              &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 48,
                NameEnd: 72,
                Name:    "pending_commit_timestamp",
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN bar SET ON UPDATE (pending_commit_timestamp())
